Home.title: Trajanov
Home.headline: When the timer hits zero, the drop is live.
Home.sub: 3 to 5 pieces. Real, limited stock. Cash on delivery.
Home.aboutLink: First place in a design competition

About.body1: Trajanov is a clothing brand from Strumica, founded in 2026. One person runs it: Vladimir Trajanov, founder and designer. He’s a student at SOU “Nikola Karev” in Strumica, training as a clothing design technician. No team. The brand makes oversized unisex t-shirts.
About.body2: In June 2026, Vladimir won first place in a t-shirt design competition for secondary-school students from the fashion and textile schools of North Macedonia. It was organised by Kreativen den, Božilović produkcija, SOU “Taki Daskalo” and the textile company EAM of Štip, and judged by a professional jury of representatives from Kreativen den and EAM. The aim was to let students show their ideas and talent through visual expression, and to give them a reference for a professional portfolio.
About.body3: The prize was 30 t-shirts made with his design, plus a visit to the EAM factory. Trajanov sells in drops of 3 to 5 pieces, with real, limited stock. Shipping within North Macedonia only, cash on delivery.
About.quote: “My plan is to start my own brand with the prize from EAM.”

Contact.instagramNote: Drops are announced here. This is the main channel.
Contact.context: Strumica, North Macedonia · Ships within North Macedonia only · Cash on delivery.

Terms.intro: This is a small brand with no company behind it. Here's exactly how ordering works — no fine print.
Terms.sellerBody: Trajanov is run by Vladimir Trajanov, in Strumica, North Macedonia. There is no registered company and no shop with an address. One person stands behind the brand.
Terms.contactBody: The fastest way to reach us is by phone or on Instagram.
Terms.paymentBody: You pay cash on delivery, when the parcel arrives. No cards, no bank transfer, no paying in advance.
Terms.shippingBody: We ship inside North Macedonia only. No delivery abroad.
Terms.orderingBody1: When you order, the stock is reserved for 48 hours — not sold on the spot. We call you to confirm. If we can't reach you, the reservation lapses and the piece goes back on sale.
Terms.orderingBody2: Maximum 2 items per order. Drops are limited and the stock is real — when it's gone, it's gone.
Terms.pricesBody: Prices are in Macedonian denars (MKD) and shown on the product page. That is the amount you pay the courier. There is no conversion to any other currency.
Terms.noBody: No accounts, no saved cards, no subscriptions, no discount codes.

Privacy.intro: We collect only what we need to get the shirt to you. Nothing more.
Privacy.collectHeading: What we collect when you order
Privacy.collectBody: Name, phone number, city, address, and your note if you leave one. That's everything. We don't collect your email — there is no email field.
Privacy.whyBody: To deliver the shirt and to call you to confirm the order. That is the only use.
Privacy.whoBody: Vladimir, and the courier who delivers to you. The order details are emailed to Vladimir so he can call you.
Privacy.storageBody: In a database hosted in Frankfurt, Germany.
Privacy.abuseBody: Because ordering is free, we store a one-way hashed form of your IP address to limit how many orders come from one connection. The raw IP is never stored.
Privacy.browserBody: The cart lives in sessionStorage and disappears when you close the tab. No advertising cookies, no tracking pixels, no analytics cookies, no social pixels.
Privacy.deleteBody: Call us and we'll delete them. No form, no portal — just the phone number.

ShippingReturns.intro: Where we ship, how you pay, and what to do if something's wrong.
ShippingReturns.paymentBody: You pay the courier in cash when the parcel arrives.
ShippingReturns.deliveryBody: We don't have these confirmed yet. We won't guess, because you pay cash at the door.
ShippingReturns.problemHeading: If something is wrong with your order
ShippingReturns.problemBody: Wrong size sent, damaged packaging, or the parcel never arrived — call the phone number and Vladimir will sort it out directly.
ShippingReturns.limitsBody: There is no online returns portal and no prepaid return label. If you need to return something, it goes through the phone.
ShippingReturns.returnsBody: We don't have the exact window confirmed yet.
